description: Execute a plan until it is complete

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` first and treat it as the sole source of review scope for this flow. Support both the legacy single-repository shape `{ "plan_path": "planning/<story-file>.md" }` and the newer multi-repository shape `{ "story_id": "<story-number>", "review_mode": "single_repo"|"multi_repo", "repos": [ { "repo_id": "<name>", "repo_root": "/abs/path/to/repo", "plan_path": "planning/<story-file>.md", "branch": "feature/<story-number>-...", "base_branch": "main" } ] }`. If the legacy shape is present, normalize it to a single repo entry rooted at the current repository. If the `repos` array shape is present, use only those repo entries and do not independently search for or select different plans. Verify that every selected plan exists, that every selected plan filename carries the same story number, and that each participating branch matches that story number. If those checks fail, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Do NOT use code_info tools for plan selection. Confirm what story the normalized review scope represents, list the participating repositories when there is more than one, and provide me with an overview of what is still remaining to be done without making file changes at this time.
If possible, git push the branch.
